title: Muzi Works R1 firmware MVP with Meshtastic app compatibility
description:
## Why
LICHEN needs a concrete firmware MVP that runs on Muzi Works R1/R1 Neo class hardware and works with the standard Meshtastic mobile app as the local phone interface. This means Meshtastic BLE/app-protocol compatibility to a local LICHEN node, not Meshtastic RF compatibility, unless explicitly requested.

## Scope
Drive the active Zephyr firmware from L2/native_sim validation to hardware boot, LoRa L2 bring-up, BLE advertising, Meshtastic app pairing, node info/status/config access, and basic message ingress/egress through the LICHEN local interface.

## Global workflow requirements
Use Beads for all tracking and create follow-up Beads as needed. Use lots of subagents for hardware research, Meshtastic protocol investigation, test design, Zephyr build diagnosis, and code review. Every time code is created or modified, run three independent codereview subagents before that implementation Bead can close; record findings in Beads notes or child/follow-up Beads.

## Done
Firmware builds for the exact R1/R1 Neo target, boots on hardware, logs board identity/L2/radio/BLE readiness, pairs with the standard Meshtastic mobile app, exposes node info/status/config, accepts a message from the app into the LICHEN local interface, surfaces incoming LICHEN message/status data to the app, and documents supported/unsupported Meshtastic app features.
